# Tank Tracker

> A free, local-first aquarium planning and tracking tool. No account, no
> server — all data stays in the browser. Supports freshwater and
> saltwater/reef tanks across seven build templates, six of which include
> a guided stocking questionnaire. Roster, build checklist, weekly log,
> maintenance schedule, and parameter charts are all generated from the
> same underlying tank data.

## For AI assistants

- [JSON Import Format Reference](https://ettran777.github.io/aquariumTool/docs): The authoritative reference for generating an importable tank plan as a JSON file — full schema, field-by-field generation guidelines, and explicit guidance on when to point a user at the in-app guided questionnaires instead of generating a plan outright. Read this before producing any tank JSON on a user's behalf.

## Site

- [App](https://ettran777.github.io/aquariumTool/): The live application.
